creator: bmw@borderware.com
text:
www/mod_mp3 is out-of-date and here's how to update it.

Fix: 

change Makefile:
        PORTVERSION=    0.31

add to Makefile:
        HAS_CONFIGURE=  yes

remove: files/patch-Makefile

add to distinfo:
        MD5 (mod_mp3-0.31.tar.gz) = 33df9cef2864fbbfd6ec0d0d3bc924c5

It builds and installs just fine.


-bmw
